params.name: unit
params.description: the systemd unit to reload (re-read config, non-disruptive)

params.name: unit
params.description: the systemd unit to START (bring a down service back up)

params.name: filesystem
params.description: the mount point / logical volume to GROW (never shrink, never delete) — the disk-full remediation

params.name: grow_by
params.description: how much to grow by (an increment the AWX play's guards bound), e.g. 10G

params.name: guest
params.description: the Proxmox VE guest (VM/LXC) to START — bring a DOWN guest that should be up back up (reversible; stop is its inverse)
